predictions.forecast_value: cyclical recession (60% probability base case); negative GDP growth
predictions.source_quote: Our base case for 2024 is a cyclical recession

predictions.forecast_value: Fed pivot to rate cuts after recession becomes obvious
predictions.source_quote: Central banks will then pivot and cut rates as the damage to growth becomes obvious.

predictions.forecast_value: above consensus / upside inflation surprises in H1 2024
predictions.source_quote: Our cyclical recession scenario starts with a period of above-consensus inflation in the first half of 2024. We would expect a series of upside inflation surprises to generate another spell of outperformance for inflation-linked bonds.
Labour markets will normalise and restore price stability before we move towards a recovery at the end of 2024

predictions.forecast_value: rates have peaked or will peak soon
predictions.source_quote: if US and other developed world interest rates have not peaked already, then they will do so soon.
